reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game but it would be better if it had a feature where you could turn around with the controller. You could just use the trackpad to turn. If this was in the game easy 5 stars
This game is boring and not as fun in 3 degrees of freedom as 6
I love the game but I can not move around and pick up more items like on the oculus quset

This game is really great, and if it could get more updates to it, that would be awesome. But, I requested a refund for the game and I really haven’t played it for a long period of time. I waited for days to see if it was refunded but this morning it said it wasn’t approved, which I’m really mad about, but still, this is a great game, but it’s just not for me.
One of the best cheap games among them all i love all the ending and how its telling you not to touch anything but that makes you want to push the button.
it’s a very good app
Amazing game for what it is although it is easy to get stuck, it was an awesome game

This is an awesome game, and seeing the many different endings ia really exciting. There is one feature that would be really nice, being able to drop things, instead of just putting them back where they were. (On the oculus go)
This game is great funny as hell hope it stays up-to-date tons of tons of potentials started not too long ago having a blast so for pond intended👍🤣

reviews.review_title: Game is amazing and storage friendly
reviews.review_description: The endings are very creative and I love all of the references to movies and other games and how they were fit into the game. The game it self does not take up a lot of storage on the headset and has a lot of well, game.

reviews.review_title: I have wanted to play, but..
reviews.review_description: The app won't install. They gonna need to fix that bug, oculus!

This was the first game I purchased when I bought my Oculus Go and it was a great introduction into VR. I’m about halfway through the game and I play it just about everyday. Thanks for the fun, keep it up guys.
It won't let me install it

The game is great but i think there should be a little bit more mobility. I like how the graphics are and think it would be great for more endings as well. This is a great game otherwise. There are some bugs with the hammer sometimes but it isnt that noticable unless you pay a lot of attention to it. Also, can the developer menu have interactions with it in a later update, i think it will make experiences better for some people.
This game is a must have for your VR headset. It’s just so fun. I think that this is great for most players!

Fun, confusing, but that is what I lik, the stamp is about buggy but other 
then that it is gud
Awsome
I had so much fun discovering all the secrets in the game. I really like the last ending. I wish there was more, it was so fun.

reviews.review_title: this game is the god game
reviews.review_description: I think this game is one of the good games of all but is hard with one control on the go🙃🙂 not the great is tho😞 sadly

So far it's great. The only problem I have is the stamp. I pick it up and the I see unable to put it down or use it. I can seem to interact with anything else. Is it a bug? I uninstalled then reinstalled it. Please help/fix.
